Scotland used to have Alan Hansen, still considered maybe Liverpool's greatest ever defender. And he struggled to get in the Scotland squad because Aberdeen greats Willie Miller and Alex McLeish were winning the Scottish League and won a European Trophy in a final against Real Madrid. And now we have one lad playing in Croatia and one in Saudi starting at the World Cup. That's a drop off.
